mainEntity.name: Difference between workers' comp and personal injury lawsuit for work slip in Draper Utah?
mainEntity.text: Difference between workers' comp and personal injury lawsuit for work slip in Draper Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers' comp in Draper offers no-fault medical wage benefits fast no lawsuit needed. PI lawsuits allow pain suffering damages but prove fault harder against employer immunity.[1][5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Comp exclusive for employer claims quick but limited. Sue third parties like contractors for full damages. Utah bars employer suits so hybrid claims strategic. Insurers use comp to cap liability. Attorney assesses both paths.[1][5]

name: Workers Comp vs Lawsuit for Draper Work Slips
